items.name: Ring of Protection

passive_effects.summary: +1 bonus to saving throws while attuned.

items.effect: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.

items.name: Ring of Spell Storing

passive_effects.summary: Stores up to 5 levels of spells. Cast stored spells using their original spell attack bonus and save DC.

items.effect: This ring stores spells cast into it, holding up to 5 spell levels at a time. Any creature can cast a spell of 1st–5th level into the ring; the spell has no effect. When worn, you can cast any spell stored in it.

items.name: Ring of Fire Resistance

passive_effects.summary: Resistance to fire damage while attuned.

items.effect: You have resistance to fire damage while wearing this ring.

items.name: Ring of Feather Falling

passive_effects.summary: Fall at 60 ft per round when you fall. Take no falling damage. Land safely.

items.effect: When you fall while wearing this ring, you descend 60 ft per round and take no damage from falling.

items.name: Ring of Invisibility

granted_spells.name: Invisibility
granted_spells.description: Turn invisible as an action. Ends if you attack or cast a spell.

items.effect: While wearing this ring, you can turn invisible as an action. Invisibility ends if you attack, deal damage, or cast a spell.

items.name: Ring of Telekinesis

granted_spells.name: Telekinesis
granted_spells.description: Cast telekinesis at will (your spellcasting save DC). No charges required.

items.effect: While wearing this ring, you can cast the telekinesis spell at will using your spellcasting save DC.

items.name: Ring of Regeneration

passive_effects.summary: Regain 1d6 HP every 10 minutes. Regrow lost limbs in 1d6+1 days.

items.effect: While wearing this ring, you regain 1d6 hit points every 10 minutes, provided you have at least 1 hit point. Also regrows lost body parts over 1d6+1 days.

items.name: Ring of Wizardry, I

passive_effects.summary: Double the number of 1st-level spell slots you have.

items.effect: While wearing this ring, you double your total number of 1st-level spell slots.
